forecast-period.text: Cloud clearing. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending westerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly and light increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
High
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly and light becoming northerly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 40 km/h before turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day, then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming northerly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Thunderstorms possibly severe with damaging winds in the east in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 30.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Hawker in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
High

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the evening. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day then turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming northerly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 27 to 32.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening, possibly severe with damaging winds south of Leigh Creek. Winds northwest to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 33.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
